export const DEMO_WILAYAS = [
  ['01', 'Adrar'], ['02', 'Chlef'], ['03', 'Laghouat'], ['04', 'Oum El Bouaghi'],
  ['05', 'Batna'], ['06', 'Bejaia'], ['07', 'Biskra'], ['08', 'Bechar'],
  ['09', 'Blida'], ['10', 'Bouira'], ['11', 'Tamanrasset'], ['12', 'Tebessa'],
  ['13', 'Tlemcen'], ['14', 'Tiaret'], ['15', 'Tizi Ouzou'], ['16', 'Alger'],
  ['17', 'Djelfa'], ['18', 'Jijel'], ['19', 'Setif'], ['20', 'Saida'],
  ['21', 'Skikda'], ['22', 'Sidi Bel Abbes'], ['23', 'Annaba'], ['24', 'Guelma'],
  ['25', 'Constantine'], ['26', 'Medea'], ['27', 'Mostaganem'], ['28', "M'Sila"],
  ['29', 'Mascara'], ['30', 'Ouargla'], ['31', 'Oran'], ['32', 'El Bayadh'],
  ['33', 'Illizi'], ['34', 'Bordj Bou Arreridj'], ['35', 'Boumerdes'], ['36', 'El Tarf'],
  ['37', 'Tindouf'], ['38', 'Tissemsilt'], ['39', 'El Oued'], ['40', 'Khenchela'],
  ['41', 'Souk Ahras'], ['42', 'Tipaza'], ['43', 'Mila'], ['44', 'Ain Defla'],
  ['45', 'Naama'], ['46', 'Ain Temouchent'], ['47', 'Ghardaia'], ['48', 'Relizane'],
].map(([code, name]) => ({ code, name }));

export const DEMO_USERS = {
  central: {
    username: 'central.demo',
    role: 1,
    org: 'central',
    firstName: 'Central',
    lastName: 'Operator',
    email: 'central.demo@naftal.dz',
    position: 'National stock supervisor',
  },
  regional: {
    username: 'regional.demo',
    role: 2,
    org: 'regional',
    firstName: 'Regional',
    lastName: 'Manager',
    email: 'regional.demo@naftal.dz',
    position: 'Wilaya depot manager',
    wilayaCode: '16',
    wilaya: { code: '16', name: 'Alger' },
  },
  gas: {
    username: 'gas.demo',
    role: 3,
    org: 'gas',
    firstName: 'Station',
    lastName: 'Operator',
    email: 'station.demo@naftal.dz',
    position: 'Gas station sales operator',
    wilayaCode: '16',
    gasStationId: 'GS-ALG-001',
    wilaya: { code: '16', name: 'Alger' },
    gasStation: { id: 'GS-ALG-001', name: 'NAFTAL Hydra Service Station' },
  },
};
